name: Lemon Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat the egg yolk.
2. Add sugar, milk, flour, lemon juice, lemon peel, and salt; beat until smooth.
3. Beat egg white until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the egg white into the lemon mixture.
5. Pour the batter into two ungreased 6-ounce custard cups (the cups will be very full).
6. Place the cups in an 8-inch square baking pan.
7. Pour boiling water into the pan to a depth of 1 inch.
8. Bake at 325 degrees for 40-45 minutes or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean and the top is golden.
9. Serve with whipped cream if desired. Yield: 2 servings.
